description: Search existing sql and knowledge about active database.
name: search_knowledge

query.description: The keyword search query to execute.

description: List all tables in the database.
name: list_tables

description: Execute a SQL query against the database.
name: execute_sql

description:
<summary>Generate a visualization spec for SQL results.</summary>
<returns>
<description>JSON string containing the visualization spec.</description>
</returns>
name: viz

chart_type.description: Optional hint for chart type (bar, line, scatter, boxplot, histogram).

request.description: Natural language description of the desired visualization.

description:
Hand a data-analysis goal to a notebook subagent.

Use this after running SQL when the answer requires multi-step calculations,
statistical analysis, data transformations, or plots.
name: analyze_data

files.description:
Optional execute_sql result keys to analyze. When omitted, the
newest bounded successful query results are included.

goal.description: The question to answer and analysis to perform.
